case_title: UNIVERSITY OF NOTRE DAME VS. SEAN GALLAVAN

docket_entries.description: ORIGINAL NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT AND PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 60528003) FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNIVERSITY OF NOTRE DAME SERVED APR-19-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GALLAVAN, SEAN PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON MAY-22-2017 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF UNIVERSITY OF NOTRE DAME

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UNIVERSITY OF NOTRE DAME RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GALLAVAN, SEAN $3,821.49 PRINCIPAL, $1,392.04 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,438.53, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $290.55 INTEREST, $49.00 COSTS, (TRANSACTION ID # 17242035) FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNIVERSITY OF NOTRE DAME
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GALLAVAN, SEAN
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 100038284) FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNIVERSITY OF NOTRE DAME AS TO DEFENDANT GALLAVAN, SEAN
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT GALLAVAN, SEAN
NON SERVICE REPORT (TRANSACTION ID # 17057049) FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNIVERSITY OF NOTRE DAME AS TO DEFENDANT GALLAVAN, SEAN
